tasks.title: Establish project foundation and metadata-first archive scope
tasks.notes: Repository identity, scope, and handoff state are documented.

tasks.title: Define source policy and citation handling
tasks.notes: Source reference quality warnings exist; source verification remains gradual.

tasks.title: Define full-text and redistribution policy
tasks.notes: Project is metadata-first and avoids restricted full text.

tasks.title: Define YAML data schema
tasks.notes: Schema covers persons, works, terms, traditions, branches, timelines, and relation files.

tasks.title: Add YAML validation tooling and CI workflow
tasks.notes: Validator exists and workflow runs on main, pull request, and manual dispatch.

tasks.title: Bootstrap Tiantai module records
tasks.notes: Initial Tiantai records include persons, branches, works, terms, timelines, and relations.

tasks.title: Stabilize source references and relation warnings
tasks.notes: Maintenance log records multiple source stabilization batches; broader coverage remains partial.

tasks.title: Prepare v0.1.0 release materials
tasks.notes: Release notes are explicitly marked draft; final release publication evidence not found.

tasks.title: Start Sanlun module scaffold
tasks.notes: Scaffold started; relation records and stronger sources are planned next steps.

tasks.title: Introduce Engineering OS v0.1 project memory layer
tasks.notes: This task creates the reusable protocol layer and Nagarjuna-specific memory, task, event, and replay files.

tasks.title: Add export or site build tooling
evidence: no explicit evidence found in file tree
